judgment.summary: Fortinet demonstrates robust growth and profitability with strong margins and a healthy balance sheet, though its valuation reflects high expectations.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 32.6%; next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 20.1% YoY and earnings growth 28.6% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin of 31.3% and profit margin of 27.5% show excellent operational efficiency.
Return on equity at 132.4% is exceptionally high, demonstrating effective use of shareholder capital.
Free cash flow of $1.81B TTM and a low debt-to-equity ratio of 57.31% indicate financial strength.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 49.93 and Forward P/E of 37.46 suggest a high valuation, pricing in significant future growth.
Price/Book of 95.19 and Price/Sales of 13.22 also indicate a premium valuation.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a mean target price below the current stock price, suggesting limited upside according to analysts.

news.paragraph: Fortinet is partnering with NVIDIA to enhance real-time AI data security, a move that could bolster its position in the rapidly growing AI infrastructure market. This collaboration comes as the company prepares for its next earnings report, which traders should monitor for any commentary on the integration and its potential impact. The partnership suggests a strategic focus on leveraging AI trends to drive future growth.

headlines.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Partners with Fortinet to Secure AI Data in Real Time

examples.body: After a sharp selloff in Software ($IGV) at the market open, $MSFT $ORCL $PANW $FTNT made a sharp reversal rebound.
$FTNT when the price is going sideways and the RSI is over 70, that can mean the trend is weakening and it's best to set a stop loss if that works for you.…
$FTNT Let’s pull her back to $120 Not asking for much
